key_points.text: NVIDIA is expanding production capacity to meet stronger-than-expected orders for its AI accelerators

citation.quote: NVIDIA said it is expanding production capacity to meet stronger-than-expected orders for its AI accelerators

key_points.text: Management cited a robust backlog and reiterated confidence in sustained data-center growth through the year

citation.quote: citing a robust backlog and reiterating confidence in sustained data-center growth through the year

key_points.text: Demand is characterized as broad-based across cloud and enterprise customers

citation.quote: Management characterized demand as broad-based across cloud and enterprise customers
